name: CourseBloom Space
description: Multi-tenant online course platform - Course, Payment, Affiliate, AI Content, Booking & Analytics APIs

endpoints.name: check_tenant
endpoints.description: Check if a tenant slug is available for registration

slug.description: Tenant slug to check (3-20 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens)

endpoints.description: Track affiliate click and set tracking cookie (30 days)

endpoints.description: Get current affiliate tracking status from cookies
